name: kaseki-agent
description: Ephemeral coding-agent runner with Pi CLI and OpenRouter

scripts.test: npm run check:syntax && node test/unit/kaseki-cli.test.js && node test/unit/kaseki-report.test.js && bash run-kaseki-json.test.sh && bash scripts/test-github-app.sh
scripts.check:syntax: bash -c 'for file in lib/*.js; do [ -f "$file" ] && node --check "$file"; done'
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:sh
scripts.lint:fix: npm run lint:js:fix && npm run lint:sh
